title: desert reclamation
description: With the addition of straw checkerboards, this item, when used on sand, can convert the sand into plantable sand (stabilized sand).
body:
Add a touch of desert control wisdom to your Minecraft journey! This straw checkerboard mod introduces a highly practical new item: the straw checkerboard. When you use it on sand, the originally loose and flowing sand will miraculously transform into plantable stabilized sand. Whether you're creating an oasis in the desert or transforming barren sandy terrain, it can be your reliable assistant, allowing you to easily turn deserts into fertile fields in the blocky world and unlock more new ways to build and survive.
为你的《我的世界》之旅增添一份治沙智慧吧！这款草方格 mod 带来了极具实用性的新物品 —— 草方格。当你在沙地上使用它时，原本松散流动的沙子会奇迹般地转化为可以种植作物的固化沙。无论是在沙漠中开辟绿洲，还是改造荒芜的沙质地形，它都能成为你的得力助手，让你在方块世界里轻松实现从荒漠到良田的蜕变，解锁更多建造与生存的新玩法。
